title: Getting Back Into RuneScape
description: Runescape. An ancient MMO and a massive part of my childhood. It is right up there with Halo 3 and Pokémon. I’m not alone in this feeling either, I have found this to be common among nerdy people roughly my age

title: My AI is Bigger Than Yours
description: People are not afraid to share opinions on the internet, but they sure are afraid of falling behind other people who do the same thing. Yet, it seems like anything of value

title: Image Optimization
description: If one can cache cheaply, then cache you should. But I found out the hard way that without good edge caching or simply that ONE time the user has to load your site for the first time and you don't have any optimization

title: Learning GO as a Noob
description: Learning Go with a heavy Java background has been relatively easy for me so far, but I really want to get into the nitty-gritty. I’m rather agnostic with what I do in code as long as it's fun

title: Learning Game Development as a Noob
description: I want to make video games and know how they work at a deeper level. I don't want to generate code and assets with an AI, or let a modern game engine do all the work
